## Summary

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] CI / deploy

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` and `go test -race ./...` pass
- [ ] Coverage still meets CI gate (≥ 90%) if code changed
- [ ] README / docs updated when public surface or deploy story changes
- [ ] No secrets committed
